title: World Backup
description: Never lose a Minecraft world again. World Backup automatically saves all your worlds the moment you close the game!
body:
# World Backup

**Never lose a Minecraft world again.**

World Backup is a lightweight Fabric mod that automatically backs up all your Minecraft worlds the moment you close the game. No commands. No buttons. No setup. Just install it and forget about it — your worlds are always protected.

---

## How it works

Every time you quit Minecraft, World Backup silently runs in the background and saves a compressed copy of all your worlds to your backup folder. You will never have to think about it.

---

## Features

- **Automatic backups** — triggers the moment you close Minecraft, every single time
- **ZIP compression** — backups are compressed to save disk space
- **Automatic rotation** — keeps only your most recent backups and deletes older ones automatically
- **Backup logging** — saves a log of every backup with timestamps
- **Fully configurable** — everything is controlled through a simple text config file in your Downloads folder
- **Works with any launcher** — Modrinth App, vanilla launcher, CurseForge, ATLauncher, and more
- **Lightweight** — runs silently with zero performance impact while you play

---

## Configuration

On first launch, World Backup creates a file called **worldbackup.config** in your **Downloads folder**. Open it in any text editor to customize:

```
# Path to your Minecraft worlds
saves_path=C:\Users\YOU\AppData\Roaming\ModrinthApp\profiles\YOUR_PROFILE\saves

# Path where backups will be saved
backup_path=C:\Users\YOU\AppData\Roaming\ModrinthApp\profiles\YOUR_PROFILE\backups

# Enable ZIP compression (true/false)
enable_compression=true

# Save a log of all backups (true/false)
enable_logging=true

# Auto-delete old backups (true/false)
enable_rotation=true

# How many backups to keep
max_backups=5
```

The config file includes examples for every major launcher so you always know exactly what to change.

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net) for Minecraft 26.1.2
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop `worldbackup.jar` into your mods folder
4. Launch Minecraft
5. Open `worldbackup.config` in your Downloads folder and set your `saves_path`
6. Play — your worlds are now automatically backed up every session

---

## Compatibility

| Launcher | Supported |
|----------|-----------|
| Modrinth App | ✅ |
| Vanilla Minecraft Launcher | ✅ |
| CurseForge | ✅ |
| ATLauncher | ✅ |
| Prism Launcher | ✅ |

---
